# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: web
        image: your-web-app-image
        ports:
        - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: memcached
        image: memcached:latest
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-workers
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: workers
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: workers
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: worker
        image: your-worker-image
        env:
        - name: MEMCACHED_SERVICE_HOST
          valueFrom:
            fieldRef:
              fieldPath: status.podIP
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8080
